# MIME Type Test Files

This folder contains test files for MIME type validation testing.

## Folder Structure

- **Images/**: Image files (PNG, JPG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, WebP)
- **Audio/**: Audio files (MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC, M4A)
- **Video/**: Video files (MP4, AVI, MOV, WMV, MKV, WebM)
- **Document/**: Document files (PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX, PPT, PPTX, ODT, RTF)
- **Text/**: Text files (TXT, CSV, JSON, XML, HTML, CSS, JS, MD)

## Generated Files

- **Text files**: Fully generated and ready to use
- **Image files**: Simple colored images generated (100x100 pixels)
- **Audio files**: Placeholders created - replace with actual audio files
- **Video files**: Placeholders created - replace with actual video files
- **Document files**: Placeholders created - replace with actual documents

## How to Get Real Media Files

For audio, video, and document files, you can:

1. **Download from**: https://file-examples.com
2. **Use your own test files**
3. **Generate using online tools**

## Usage

These files are used for automated MIME type testing in the CometChat sample app.
